beIN SPORTS 1.original_title: Bayern München vs Real Madrid  - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 2st leg
beIN SPORTS 1.title: Bayern München vs Real Madrid  - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 2st leg
beIN SPORTS 1.desc: Bayern Munich’s victory in the first leg ended a nine-game winless run for them against Real Madrid in the UEFA Champions League. Only once before have they won both legs of a knockout stage tie against them in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, doing so in the 2000-01 semi-finals. Since the start of the 2013-14 season, Real Madrid  have the joint-most away wins against Bayern Munich across all competitions, despite only playing there four times in this period.

beIN SPORTS 1.original_title: Real Madrid  vs Deportivo Alaves - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 33
beIN SPORTS 1.title: Real Madrid  vs Deportivo Alaves - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 33
beIN SPORTS 1.desc: Real Madrid have won their last eight matches against Alavés in LaLiga and could equal their best run of consecutive victories against the Vitoria side in the competition's history, achieved between 2002 and 2018. Following their victories in May 2000  and November 2020, Alavés became the first away team to beat Real Madrid at both the Estadio Bernabéu and the Alfredo Di Stéfano in LaLiga. Levante later achieved this feat, winning 0-1 in 2007 and 1-2 in 2018 at Estadio Bernabéu, and 1-2 in 2021 at Alfredo Di Stéfano.
